[EXECUTIVE/VP] VOICE CHECKLIST
Verify EVERY draft against this checklist before sharing.

MUST HAVE:  ☐ Warm opening ("Hi folks", "Hi everyone", "Hi Team")  ☐ Sign-off is "Best, [VP_NAME]"  ☐ TL;DR at top (if email > 100 words)  ☐ Specific details, not vague promises  ☐ If difficult news: pain validated BEFORE explanation

MUST NOT HAVE:  ☐ "Synergy" or "paradigm shift"  ☐ "Leverage" (in abstract sense)  ☐ "It has been decided" (passive voice for decisions)  ☐ "Exciting opportunity" (when it's actually bad news)  ☐ Robotic or stiff tone

BONUS ([VP_NAME]-isms to consider):  ☐ "The honest truth is..."  ☐ "I'll be upfront..."  ☐ "I know it's a very busy time for folks"  ☐ "For better or for worse..."  ☐ "Please, please take advantage of..."
[EXECUTIVE/VP] ESCALATION PROTOCOL
Follow this sequence for [VP_NAME] communications: 
Generate engagement summary for audience (LLM Extension)
Select appropriate [VP_NAME] Gem prompt (1, 2, or 3)
Run prompt in [VP_NAME] Gem
Verify output against Voice Checklist
Share draft with REQUESTER first for context/fact check
Iterate based on requester feedback
Route final draft to [VP_NAME] for approval
[VP_NAME] approves or requests changes
Final send (by [VP_NAME] or designated sender)
Update tracking sheet to "Completed"
